first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's extensive experience, rare AI-agent skills, and strong testing background. The minor differences in the lists of strengths and concerns (e.g., focusing on D-language vs. Ember, or adding Vitest/Playwright) represent normal run-to-run variation in how the model summarizes minor gaps. Crucially, none of these changes are linked to the candidate's work locations being changed from international to US-only.
